mapper.select: SELECT seller_no, seller_id, password FROM nextjs_shop_seller WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND approval_status = 'APPROVED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_token(connect_ip, connect_agent, refresh_token, seller_no) VALUES(#{t.connectIp}, #{t.connectAgent}, #{t.refreshToken}, #{sellerNo})
mapper.select: SELECT s.seller_no FROM nextjs_shop_token t JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s ON t.seller_no = s.seller_no WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND connect_ip = #{connectIp} AND connect_agent = #{connectAgent} ORDER BY created_at DESC, token_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT seller_name, seller_name_en, extension_number, mobile_number, email, business_registration_number, telecom_sales_number, representative_name, business_zipcode, business_address, business_address_detail FROM nextjs_shop_seller WHERE seller_no = #{sellerNo}

SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.color_name, p.origin_price, p.final_price, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.like_count, p.view_count, p.wish_count, p.sale_stop, p.menu_sub_id, ms.menu_name AS subMenuName, mt.menu_name AS topMenuName, mt.gender, p.material_info, p.manufacturer_name, p.country_of_origin, p.wash_care_info, p.manufactured_ym, p.quality_guarantee_info, p.after_service_contact, p.after_service_manager, p.after_service_phone, COALESCE(rs.avgRating, 0) AS avgRating, COALESCE(rs.reviewCount, 0) AS reviewCount FROM nextjs_shop_product p JOIN nextjs_shop_menu_sub ms ON p.menu_sub_id = ms.menu_sub_id JOIN nextjs_shop_menu_top mt ON mt.menu_top_id = ms.menu_top_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po.product_id, ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1) AS avgRating, COUNT(*) AS reviewCount FROM nextjs_shop_review r JOIN nextjs_shop_order_item oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id JOIN nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh ON oi.hold_id = sh.hold_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON sh.product_option_id = po.product_option_id WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY po.product_id ) rs ON rs.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.seller_no = #{sellerNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_product(name, color_name, origin_price, final_price, seller_no, menu_sub_id, material_info, manufacturer_name, country_of_origin, wash_care_info, manufactured_ym, quality_guarantee_info, after_service_contact, after_service_manager, after_service_phone) VALUES(#{p.name}, #{p.colorName}, #{p.originPrice}, #{p.finalPrice}, #{sellerNo}, #{p.menuSubId}, #{p.materialInfo}, #{p.manufacturerName}, #{p.countryOfOrigin}, #{p.washCareInfo}, #{p.manufacturedYm}, #{p.qualityGuaranteeInfo}, #{p.afterServiceContact}, #{p.afterServiceManager}, #{p.afterServicePhone})
mapper.update: UPDATE nextjs_shop_product SET name = #{p.name}, color_name = #{p.colorName}, origin_price = #{p.originPrice}, final_price = #{p.finalPrice}, product_image_updated_at = IF(#{p.imageUpdate}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, product_image_updated_at), sale_stop = #{p.saleStop}, menu_sub_id = #{p.menuSubId}, material_info = #{p.materialInfo}, manufacturer_name = #{p.manufacturerName}, country_of_origin = #{p.countryOfOrigin}, wash_care_info = #{p.washCareInfo}, manufactured_ym = #{p.manufacturedYm}, quality_guarantee_info = #{p.qualityGuaranteeInfo}, after_service_contact = #{p.afterServiceContact}, after_service_manager = #{p.afterServiceManager}, after_service_phone = #{p.afterServicePhone} WHERE product_id = #{p.productId} AND seller_no = #{sellerNo}
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.color_name, p.origin_price, p.final_price, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.product_image_updated_at, p.like_count, p.view_count, p.wish_count, p.sale_stop, p.menu_sub_id, ms.menu_name AS subMenuName, mt.menu_top_id, mt.menu_name AS topMenuName, mt.gender, p.material_info, p.manufacturer_name, p.country_of_origin, p.wash_care_info, p.manufactured_ym, p.quality_guarantee_info, p.after_service_contact, p.after_service_manager, p.after_service_phone FROM nextjs_shop_product p JOIN nextjs_shop_menu_sub ms ON p.menu_sub_id = ms.menu_sub_id JOIN nextjs_shop_menu_top mt ON mt.menu_top_id = ms.menu_top_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND p.seller_no = #{sellerNo}

SELECT pi.product_image_id, pi.product_id, pi.sort_key, pi.is_thumbnail, pi.file_id, f.file_name, f.store_name, f.file_path, f.copyright, f.copyright_url FROM nextjs_shop_product_image pi JOIN nextjs_shop_file f ON pi.file_id = f.file_id WHERE pi.product_id = #{productId} AND f.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_product_option ( product_id, add_price, stock, size ) SELECT #{po.productId}, #{po.addPrice}, #{po.stock}, #{po.size} FROM nextjs_shop_product p WHERE p.product_id = #{po.productId} AND p.seller_no = #{sellerNo}
mapper.select: SELECT coupon_id, description, coupon_code, discount_type, discount_value, max_discount, minimum_order_before_amount, status, is_stackable, is_product_restricted, amount, used_count, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM nextjs_shop_coupon WHERE seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_coupon(description, coupon_code, discount_type, discount_value, max_discount, minimum_order_before_amount, is_stackable, is_product_restricted, amount, start_date, end_date, seller_no, issue_method) VALUES(#{c.description}, #{c.couponCode}, #{c.discountType}, #{c.discountValue}, #{c.maxDiscount}, #{c.minimumOrderBeforeAmount}, #{c.isStackable}, #{c.isProductRestricted}, #{c.amount}, #{c.startDate}, #{c.endDate}, #{sellerNo}, 'CLAIM')
mapper.update: UPDATE nextjs_shop_coupon SET description = #{c.description}, discount_value = #{c.discountValue}, max_discount = #{c.maxDiscount}, minimum_order_before_amount = #{c.minimumOrderBeforeAmount}, status = #{c.status}, is_stackable = #{c.isStackable}, is_product_restricted = #{c.isProductRestricted}, amount = #{c.amount}, start_date = #{c.startDate}, end_date = #{c.endDate} WHERE coupon_id = #{c.couponId} AND seller_no = #{sellerNo}
mapper.select: SELECT ca.product_id FROM nextjs_shop_coupon_allowed ca JOIN nextjs_shop_coupon c ON c.coupon_id = ca.coupon_id WHERE c.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND ca.coupon_id = #{couponId} ORDER BY ca.product_id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO nextjs_shop_coupon_allowed (coupon_id, product_id) SELECT c.coupon_id, p.product_id FROM nextjs_shop_coupon c JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.seller_no = c.seller_no WHERE c.coupon_id = #{couponId} AND c.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND p.product_id IN
#{pid}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.user_no FROM nextjs_shop_cart c JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON po.product_option_id = c.product_option_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.product_id = po.product_id WHERE p.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nextjs_shop_user_coupon uc WHERE uc.user_no = c.user_no AND uc.coupon_id = #{couponId} )

SELECT DISTINCT og.user_no FROM nextjs_shop_order_group og JOIN nextjs_shop_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = og.order_id JOIN nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh ON sh.hold_id = oi.hold_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON po.product_option_id = sh.product_option_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.product_id = po.product_id WHERE p.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nextjs_shop_user_coupon uc WHERE uc.user_no = og.user_no AND uc.coupon_id = #{couponId} )
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO nextjs_shop_user_coupon(user_no, coupon_id)
SELECT #{userNo}, #{couponId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.content, r.rating, r.created_at, u.name AS userName, po.product_id, p.name AS productName, ri.review_image_id, f.file_id, f.file_name, f.store_name, f.file_path, f.copyright, f.copyright_url FROM nextjs_shop_review r JOIN nextjs_shop_user u ON u.user_no = r.user_no JOIN nextjs_shop_order_item oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id JOIN nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh ON oi.hold_id = sh.hold_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON sh.product_option_id = po.product_option_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_review_image ri ON r.review_id = ri.review_id AND ri.sort_key = ( SELECT MIN(ri2.sort_key) FROM nextjs_shop_review_image ri2 WHERE ri2.review_id = r.review_id ) LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_file f ON ri.file_id = f.file_id AND f.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT pq.product_qna_id, pq.question, pq.created_at, pq.answer, pq.answer_read, pq.secret, pq.product_qna_type_id, pqt.code AS productQnaTypeCode, pqt.name AS productQnaTypeName, pq.product_id, p.name AS productName, u.name AS userName FROM nextjs_shop_product_qna pq JOIN nextjs_shop_product_qna_type pqt ON pq.product_qna_type_id = pqt.product_qna_type_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.product_id = pq.product_id JOIN nextjs_shop_user u ON u.user_no = pq.user_no WHERE p.seller_no = #{sellerNo} ORDER BY pq.answer IS NULL DESC, pq.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE nextjs_shop_product_qna pq JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.product_id = pq.product_id SET pq.answer = #{answer}, pq.res_created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE pq.product_qna_id = #{productQnaId} AND p.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND pq.answer_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.user_no) FROM nextjs_shop_cart c JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON po.product_option_id = c.product_option_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.product_id = po.product_id WHERE p.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nextjs_shop_user_coupon uc WHERE uc.user_no = c.user_no AND uc.coupon_id = #{couponId} )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT og.user_no) FROM nextjs_shop_order_group og JOIN nextjs_shop_order_item oi ON oi.order_id = og.order_id JOIN nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh ON sh.hold_id = oi.hold_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON po.product_option_id = sh.product_option_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON p.product_id = po.product_id WHERE p.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nextjs_shop_user_coupon uc WHERE uc.user_no = og.user_no AND uc.coupon_id = #{couponId} )
